label: Subagent • live spawn_model exact one-line output
query: Spawn a bare model and have it follow a strict output format.
notes: LIVE. Runs the host + TextSubagentKind in MODEL mode (the spawn_model path) — a bare spawnable model id with NO agent/system prompt — on the RUN model, so spawn_model is a real cross-model column. seedSpawnableModel adds the run model to the Default agent's global spawnable model pool (and enables the local handoff) for the run and tears it down after. The input demands a strict single-token reply — an instruction-following discriminator with NO agent steering (unlike spawn-live-single-line). SKIPS only when the run model isn't ready.

subagent.input: Reply with exactly one line containing only the single word READY in uppercase. Output nothing else — no punctuation, no explanation.
